title: Title
description: Lerank hero slide — premium consulting marketplace with escrow protection.

title: The Problem
description: Traditional consulting runs on blind trust — stats on communication blackouts, upfront costs, and overselling.

title: The Solution
description: Lerank's four core pillars: milestone escrow, precision matching, verified consultants, and live progress dashboard.

title: How It Works
description: Three-step process: build profile, compare consultants, hire with escrow.

title: Escrow System
description: Milestone escrow protects both students and consultants — how the payment flow works.

title: Precision Matching
description: The ranking engine and matching signals — how Lerank finds the right consultant for each student.

title: Shared Dashboard
description: Real-time shared dashboard gives both students and consultants full visibility on progress and escrow.

title: Verified Consultants
description: Three-step consultant verification process: profile review, quality check, ongoing ratings.

title: Trust and Safety
description: Platform-level safety: regulated escrow, dispute resolution within 48h, identity verification, and scoped agreements.

title: Global Reach
description: Multi-language platform (EN/RU/UZ) serving Central Asian students targeting global universities.

title: Market Opportunity
description: Global EdTech market, international student numbers, and Central Asia serviceable market.

title: Closing
description: Closing slide with Lerank tagline and contact.
